stemHtml: If a published back-beam ILS approach is to be flown, what must be considered? There will be no published glideslope available and reverse sensing will occur on the Omni Bearing Indicator (OBI)..

options.a: unless the back course is set and on the HSI unless the front course is set.
options.b: irrelevant of the course set and reversing sensing is eliminated if the front course is set on an HSI.
options.c: irrelevant of the course set and on the HSI unless the back course is set.
options.d: unless the front course is set and HSI unless the back course is set.
